languages.text: "Плоть слаба. Но ее эффективность может быть повышена с помощью благословенного металла. Согласно директивам Омниссии, центровые жизнеформы, как и центровые механизмы, должны выдерживать максимальную нагрузку и выдавать лучшие результаты — в их улучшении и состоит мой долг".

"Flesh is weak. But its efficiency can be improved with blessed metal. According to the directives of the Omnissiah, pivotal life forms, like pivotal mechanisms, must withstand maximum stress and produce the best results — my duty lies in improving them."
languages.original_text: "Плоть слаба. Но ее эффективность может быть повышена с помощью благословенного металла. Согласно директивам Омниссии, центровые жизнеформы, как и центровые механизмы, должны выдерживать максимальную нагрузку и выдавать лучшие результаты — в их улучшении и состоит мой долг".

traits.locale_text: "Flesh is weak. But its efficiency can be improved with blessed metal. According to the directives of the Omnissiah, pivotal life forms, like pivotal mechanisms, must withstand maximum stress and produce the best results — my duty lies in improving them."

"Flesh is weak. But its efficiency can be improved with blessed metal. According to the directives of the Omnissiah, pivotal life forms, like pivotal mechanisms, must withstand maximum stress and produce the best results — my duty lies in improving them."

"Flesh is weak. But its efficiency can be improved with blessed metal. According to the directives of the Omnissiah, pivotal life forms, like pivotal mechanisms, must withstand maximum stress and produce the best results — my duty lies in improving them."

languages.text: "Fleisch ist schwach. Aber gesegnetes Metall kann seine Effizienz steigern. Die Gebote des Omnissiah besagen, dass zentrale Lebensformen und Mechanismen maximaler Belastung standhalten und bestmögliche Ergebnisse liefern müssen ... meine Pflicht ist ihre Verbesserung."
languages.original_text: "Flesh is weak. But its efficiency can be improved with blessed metal. According to the directives of the Omnissiah, pivotal life forms, like pivotal mechanisms, must withstand maximum stress and produce the best results — my duty lies in improving them."

traits.locale_text: "Fleisch ist schwach. Aber gesegnetes Metall kann seine Effizienz steigern. Die Gebote des Omnissiah besagen, dass zentrale Lebensformen und Mechanismen maximaler Belastung standhalten und bestmögliche Ergebnisse liefern müssen ... meine Pflicht ist ihre Verbesserung."

languages.text: « La chair est faible, mais son efficacité peut être améliorée à l'aide du métal sacré. Selon les directives de l'Omnimessie, les entités essentielles, tout comme les mécanismes clés, doivent résister à un stress maximum et produire les meilleurs résultats, raison pour laquelle mon devoir consiste à les optimiser. »
languages.original_text: "Flesh is weak. But its efficiency can be improved with blessed metal. According to the directives of the Omnissiah, pivotal life forms, like pivotal mechanisms, must withstand maximum stress and produce the best results — my duty lies in improving them."

traits.locale_text: « La chair est faible, mais son efficacité peut être améliorée à l'aide du métal sacré. Selon les directives de l'Omnimessie, les entités essentielles, tout comme les mécanismes clés, doivent résister à un stress maximum et produire les meilleurs résultats, raison pour laquelle mon devoir consiste à les optimiser. »

languages.text: “血肉羸弱，但受祝金属能够提高它的效率。根据欧姆尼赛亚的教义，关键的生命体与关键的机械一样，必须承受最大负荷并产出最佳结果——而我的职责，就在于改进它们。”
languages.original_text: "Flesh is weak. But its efficiency can be improved with blessed metal. According to the directives of the Omnissiah, pivotal life forms, like pivotal mechanisms, must withstand maximum stress and produce the best results — my duty lies in improving them."

traits.locale_text: “血肉羸弱，但受祝金属能够提高它的效率。根据欧姆尼赛亚的教义，关键的生命体与关键的机械一样，必须承受最大负荷并产出最佳结果——而我的职责，就在于改进它们。”

languages.text: «La carne es débil, pero su eficacia se puede mejorar mediante la bendición del metal. Según las directrices del Omnissiah, las formas de vida esenciales, al igual que los mecanismos esenciales, deben superar el máximo de carga y producir resultados óptimos. Mi labor consiste en mejorarlas».
languages.original_text: "Flesh is weak. But its efficiency can be improved with blessed metal. According to the directives of the Omnissiah, pivotal life forms, like pivotal mechanisms, must withstand maximum stress and produce the best results — my duty lies in improving them."

traits.locale_text: «La carne es débil, pero su eficacia se puede mejorar mediante la bendición del metal. Según las directrices del Omnissiah, las formas de vida esenciales, al igual que los mecanismos esenciales, deben superar el máximo de carga y producir resultados óptimos. Mi labor consiste en mejorarlas».

languages.text: 「肉体は脆い。だが、祝福された金属によってその効率は高められる。オムニサイアの教令によれば、要となる生命体は、要となる機構と同じく、最大限の負荷に耐え、最良の結果を生み出さねばならない――それらを改良することこそ、自分の務めなのだ。」
languages.original_text: "Flesh is weak. But its efficiency can be improved with blessed metal. According to the directives of the Omnissiah, pivotal life forms, like pivotal mechanisms, must withstand maximum stress and produce the best results — my duty lies in improving them."

traits.locale_text: 「肉体は脆い。だが、祝福された金属によってその効率は高められる。オムニサイアの教令によれば、要となる生命体は、要となる機構と同じく、最大限の負荷に耐え、最良の結果を生み出さねばならない――それらを改良することこそ、自分の務めなのだ。」

languages.text: "Et zayıftır. Ancak verimliliği kutsanmış metalle artırılabilir. Hermesih'in yönergeleri, kilit mekanizmalar gibi kilit yaşam formları da maksimum strese dayanmalı ve en iyi sonucu üretmelidir der. Vazifem onları geliştirmekte yatıyor."
languages.original_text: "Flesh is weak. But its efficiency can be improved with blessed metal. According to the directives of the Omnissiah, pivotal life forms, like pivotal mechanisms, must withstand maximum stress and produce the best results — my duty lies in improving them."
